title: Verify Happy Path: User sets a reminder via Trial Corner
description: Tests that a user in the target cohort can navigate to the Trial Corner, use the 'Remind me' toggle, and confirm the action.
preconditions: User has not watched any content for more than 5 minutes since trial activation.

steps.description: 1. Observe the persistent 'Trial Mode' widget in the header.
2. Click the 'Manage Control Center' link on the widget.
3. On the 'Trial Corner' Hub, locate the 'Manage Trial' section.
4. Click the toggle for 'Remind me 24h before trial ends.'.

expected_result: The toggle activates successfully, a confirmation message appears (e.g., 'Reminder set!'), and the 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired with page source 'trial corner'.
